title: PlayerWarp
body:

![Applicable Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Applicable%20Version-1.7.x--26.x-blue)
![Paid Plugin](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paid%20Plugin-Partially%20Paid-blue)

![Latest Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fricedoc.handyplus.cn%2Fversion.json&query=%24.PlayerWarp&prefix=v&label=Latest%20Version)

### I. Introduction

> PlayerWarp —— A useful cross-server warp plugin  
> Server owners can use it with minimal configuration

![PlayerWarp](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/plugin/PlayerWarp/0.webp)

1. Supports **MySQL** and local **SQLite** storage
2. Supports customizing 99% of GUI content
3. Supports enabling/disabling most features
4. Full GUI operation, players don't need to remember any commands
5. Supports warp types
6. Supports creating warps with points or currency
7. Supports warp ratings, give warps 5-star reviews
8. Supports paid upvoting and downvoting of warps, increase popularity for warp sorting
9. Supports managing my warps in GUI
10. Supports favoriting warps
11. Supports cross-server teleportation
12. Supports player custom logos
13. Customizable commands to execute before teleportation
14. Can customize unlimited warp control based on permissions
15. Data security, configurable automatic backup of all data to backUp folder (1.5.2+)

### II. Related Information

AfDian: [Store](https://afdian.com/item/0c8f218c134111ed956252540025c377)

### III. Plugin Dependencies

**All are optional**

PlaceholderAPI PAPI variables  
[SpigotMc](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/6245/)

Vault Economy plugin (requires base plugins like ess, cmi, etc.)  
[SpigotMc](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/34315)

PlayerPoints Points plugin  
[SpigotMc](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/playerpoints.80745/)

PlayerCurrency Multi-currency plugin requires 1.0.3+  
[Click to view](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/wiki/PlayerCurrency/README)
